---
title: "Publications"
---

## 2026

Wood, M.; Dennett, A.; Suel, E.; Casey, G. (2026). Car dependence in England and Wales: Spatial Inequalities and Implications for a Just Transition. *Frontiers in Sustainable Cities 7* 1719495 [Link](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/sustainable-cities/articles/10.3389/frsc.2025.1719495/full)


## 2024

Suel, E.; Lynch, C.; Wood, M.; Murat, T.; Casey, G.; Dennett, A. (2024). Measuring transport-associated urban inequalities: Where are we and where do we go from here?. *Transport Reviews 44 (6)* 1235-1257 [Link](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/01441647.2024.2389800)
